title: senecio coronopifolius
intro: Senecio coronopifolius, also known as the Crown Daisy or Buttercup Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio coronopifolius include treating digestive problems, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Senecio coronopifolius is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or ointment form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
